releases.title: Push Notifications & Cross-Device Sync
added: Background push notifications — reminders arrive even when app is closed
Cross-device sync via Supabase — check a dua on mobile, see it on desktop
Custom duas — add your own supplications with full Arabic support
Missed day recovery — mark past days as complete
improved: Notification reminders now use server-side push (no longer requires app to be open)
Sound feedback on check, uncheck, and full completion
User avatar with sync status indicator

releases.title: PWA & Offline Support
added: Installable as a PWA — add to home screen on iOS and Android
Full offline support via Service Worker
Dark and light mode with persisted preference
improved: Arabic typography using Noto Naskh Arabic
Faster load times with cached assets

releases.title: Initial Release
added: 14 curated duas with Arabic, English, and transliteration
Morning, Evening, After Ṣalāh, and Anytime session filters
